More than a treat

It's a moment you share.

Dogs don't remember brands. They remember moments. That's why we created Dog Gelato — a simple ritual that turns an ordinary afternoon into something worth wagging for.

From tiny paws to giant ones, every dog deserves a happy moment. That's the whole idea, really.

— The Dog Gelato team

How it works

Simple to make. Easy to love.

No freezer aisle, no cold chain, no fuss. Just three steps between your pantry and a happy tail.

1

Mix.

Add water to one cup of Dog Gelato powder. No complicated preparation, no special equipment.

2

Freeze.

Pour into the cup and freeze for 4–6 hours. A little patience, a lot of excitement.

3

Love.

Serve and enjoy together. The best moments are always shared.

Mix.

Just add water. No complicated preparation.

Freeze.

A little patience. A lot of excitement.

♥ ♥ ♥

Love.

The best moments are always shared.

For distributors & retail partners

Built to scale, from one shelf to one continent.

Engineered for partners who ship across climates: ambient-stable, heat-tested, and ready for retail — no cold chain required from factory to shelf.

24mo
Shelf life, room temperature
40°C
Proven heat resistance in transit
20K
MOQ per flavor, private label
Israeli Ministry of Agriculture certified · EU Feed Regulations compliant · Kosher (Beit Yosef) · Successfully piloted to the USA
